历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 431 → 466 → 459 → 467 → 496, showing a gradual backward shift, with a cumulative shift of about 65 places over the past 5 years; the baseline for 2025 is about 496 places; the enrollment plans for Science/Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 were 27, 26, 24, 20, and 12 respectively, showing a decreasing trend year by year; the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan expands to 20, an increase of 8 places (+67%) compared to 2025, significantly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 17th (Top 20) on the Soft Science main list in 2026, with a stable upward trend in recent years; the reputation evaluation in 2026 is somewhat negative (teacher ethics incidents), but neutral/mixed in 2025; Douyin popularity is relatively high (overall ranking 44th); no obvious records of admission cut-off drops; 15 A- or above disciplines including Statistics A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Law A+, Sociology A+, etc., with both science and engineering and social sciences.
6. [Major Popularity and Environment] Computer Science recommended, Electronic Information/Communication highly recommended, Electrical Engineering highly recommended, Statistics recommended, with overall high popularity of science and engineering majors; the number of Physics Category candidates in the province in 2026 is about 206,500, an increase of about 20% from 172,468 in 2025, intensifying competition.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: The main campus is located in Beijing, which has a strong attraction for Shaanxi candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Shaanxi is about 1.4% (2024), which is moderately low.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the gradual backward shift trend of historical rankings, the significant expansion of 67% in Physics Category in 2026, and the 20% increase in provincial candidates, the expansion rate far exceeds the candidate growth rate, significantly easing competition pressure; the Physics Category enrollment majors are mainly popular directions such as Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science, and Statistics, and high application enthusiasm may attract more high-scoring candidates. The predicted minimum ranking is about 724, with a range of 641–807.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 67 → 76 → 69 → 77 → 104, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 35 positions in the last two years; the 2025 baseline is about 104 positions; from 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for liberal arts/history category were 26, 27, 19, 19, and 32 respectively; in 2026, the history category enrollment plan significantly expands to 43, an increase of 11 (+34%) compared to 2025, significantly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; on the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, approximately 17th (Top 20), with stable or rising rankings in recent years; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (teacher ethics incidents), but 2025 was neutral/mixed (including positive signals from research achievements); Douyin popularity is relatively high (overall ranking 44th), with medium to high short video exposure; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; Law A+, Applied Economics A+, Journalism and Communication A+, Business Administration A+, Theoretical Economics A+, Sociology A+, Statistics A+, Marxist Theory A+, and 15 other A- or above disciplines, with top strength in humanities and social sciences.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Law, Finance/Economics/Economy are experiencing divided social popularity and wait-and-see attitudes; in 2026, the number of history category examinees in this province is about 88,500, an increase of about 17% from 75,641 in 2025, intensifying competition; the main campus is located in Beijing, which has strong appeal to Shaanxi examinees; the university's enrollment proportion in Shaanxi is about 1.4% (2024), which is moderately low.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend in historical rankings, the significant 34% expansion in history category enrollment in 2026, and the 17% increase in provincial examinees, the expansion rate is significantly larger than the examinee growth rate, significantly easing competition pressure; the somewhat negative reputation may cause a few high-scoring examinees to hesitate, but Renmin University's top position in humanities and social sciences remains highly attractive.
